characters.permanent_features: 留着小胡子和落腮胡，黑色长发，眼神深沉冷峻，头戴一顶宽边的黑色竹编斗笠。
光头，头顶处纹有金色/浅色的古汉字或特殊符号刺青，粗眉，神态凶狠嗜肉。

storyboards.speaker: R1
storyboards.scene_description: 在昏暗的中国古代小酒馆里，戴着黑色竹编斗笠、留着小胡子的侠客（R1）正面带挑衅的微笑，语带杀气地说出带有威胁性质的话语。
storyboards.lighting_description: 温暖且昏暗的烛光和环境光，将主体的右半边脸微微照亮，形成高对比度的戏剧性光影。
storyboards.camera_movement: 中近景，固定镜头，专注展现侠客沉着与轻蔑的神态表情变化。
storyboards.positive_prompt: A close-up shot of a Chinese swordsman wearing a black bamboo hat and black clothing, with a mustache and beard, speaking calmly in a dimly lit traditional Chinese tavern. warm dim lighting, cinematic depth of field, high detail.
storyboards.negative_prompt: modern elements, bright daylight, neon lights, 3D render, cartoon.

storyboards.scene_description: 光头纹身大汉（R2）正在大口吃着手里的肉，听到侠客的威胁话语后动作一顿，神色转而冷峻粗暴，警觉地斜眼朝侠客的方向看去。随后画面回切到侠客（R1）沉着冷静的微笑面庞。
storyboards.lighting_description: 柔和微弱的环境光，烛光在人物面部与衣服的纹理上投射下深色阴影。
storyboards.camera_movement: 中景镜头切分，先拍摄光头大汉听到话后的定格反应，随后切到侠客的淡定表情作为对视响应。
storyboards.positive_prompt: A muscular bald Chinese warrior with gold tattoos on his head sitting in a tavern, holding a piece of meat, looking up suspiciously, reacting to a threat. The scene shifts to the calm expression of the swordsman in the black bamboo hat. Warm candle light, film grain, ancient Chinese inn atmosphere.
storyboards.negative_prompt: modern, vibrant colors, clean face, sci-fi.

storyboards.scene_description: 侠客（R1）在黑色袍子下暗暗挪动手部，意欲拔剑或出手。镜头同时展现了光头大汉（R2）在桌前全神贯注地盯着他的动态，空气中弥漫着大战一触即发的紧张气氛。
storyboards.lighting_description: 侧光与顶光结合，强调细节和手部潜藏动作的阴影层次，烘托紧迫感。
storyboards.camera_movement: 快速切分特写，先展示侠客在衣襟下欲动手的特写镜头，再快速切到光头大汉紧绷的面部神色。
storyboards.positive_prompt: Close-up of a hand moving stealthily under black clothing to draw a weapon, transitioning to the tense expression of the muscular bald warrior with head tattoos in a dimly lit tavern, looking ready to fight. Dramatic lighting, high contrast, cinematic.
